name: Rice and Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Canned Onion Soup (21 1/2 oz each, 2 Campbells)
2 Canned Chicken Broth (21 1/2 oz each, 2 Campbells)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a large kettle over medium heat.
2. Add noodles and cook until lightly browned, stirring frequently for about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: onion soup, chicken broth, soy sauce, water, and sliced water chestnuts.
4. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
5. Transfer the mixture into a 3-quart casserole dish.
6. Place the casserole in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 45 minutes or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
8. Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
9. Serves 8 people.
